findings.description: The candidate rule 'rule_lisraya_icon_callout_box_geometry' is overloaded. The source document defines distinct critical constraints: geometric mathematical scaling formulas, non-standard mandatory border-radius/corner-radius proportions (5:1 ratio, 40px/8px and 20px/4px), drop shadow specifications, and email rendering fallback alternatives (pre-composited PNG vs Outlook degrading). These should be split into discrete rules to prevent loss of visual design validation fidelity.
